info.name: Immich Integration
info.summary: Browse your Immich photo library directly in Nextcloud
info.description:
Seamlessly integrates your [Immich](https://immich.app) photo library into Nextcloud.
**Features:** - 🖼️ **Timeline** — lazy-loaded photo & video timeline grouped by date - 📁 **Albums** — browse, create, rename and delete Immich albums - 👤 **People** — explore your library by recognized person (face recognition) - 🗺️ **Map** — interactive map of all geotagged photos - 🔍 **Explore** — browse by city, country, state, object or tag - 🔎 **Lightbox** — full-screen viewer with keyboard navigation, pinch-to-zoom and EXIF metadata - ⭐ **Favorites** — mark and unmark photos as favorites - 💾 **Save to Nextcloud** — save Immich originals directly to your Nextcloud Files - ⬆️ **Upload to Immich** — send photos and videos from Nextcloud Files to Immich - ☑️ **Multi-select** — batch operations across any view
info.author: Marcel Meyer
